subtitle: More easily, by your side!
description: With our all-in-one application, keep control of your wallet. Pay your electricity with simplicity and enjoy our bonuses with each use
signinAdvantages: Sign in to access exclusive features, track your rides, and enjoy faster booking

error.playServicesErrorDescription: Google Play Services are not available or outdated.
error.signInErrorDescription: An error occurred during sign-in. Please try again.
error.userInfoError: Failed to get user information from Google Sign-In.
error.networkErrorDescription: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.fetchRidesErrorDescription: Unable to fetch your ride history. Please check your connection and try again.
error.fetchRidesErrorDescriptionGeneric: Unable to fetch rides. Please check your connection and try again.
error.locationErrorDescription: Unable to get your location. Please check your location permissions and try again.

map.title: Map
map.mapsOnlyAvailable: Maps are only available on Android and iOS
map.googleMapsError: Failed to load Google Maps. Please check your configuration.
map.appleMapsError: Failed to load Apple Maps. Please check your configuration.
map.mapErrorDescription: Please check your configuration and ensure all the necessary location permissions are granted.
map.locationPermissionDenied: Location permission was denied. Please enable it in settings.
map.locationError: Failed to get your location. Please try again.

step1.title: Book Your Ride
step1.description: Request a ride in seconds. Our smart system connects you with the nearest available driver instantly.

step2.title: Track in Real-Time
step2.description: Watch your driver approach in real-time. Know exactly when they'll arrive and follow your journey live.

step3.title: Safe & Secure
step3.description: Travel with confidence. All our drivers are verified and your payments are secure. Your safety is our priority.

home.title: Home
home.tapMapToSelect: Tap on map to select location
home.allowCarpooling: Allow driver to pick up other passengers (Carpooling)

history.title: Ride History
history.noRidesDescription: You don't have any ride history yet. Start your very first ride today!

ride.title: Ride Details
ride.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this ride?
ride.cancelAcceptConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel accepting this ride?
ride.notFoundDescription: This ride could not be found.
ride.invalidRate: Please select a rating between 1 and 5.
ride.confirmRideDescription: Please confirm the ride details and the price set by the driver.
ride.editRideDescription: Modify the locations, stops, or carpooling of your ride.
ride.pendingStatusDescription: Your ride has been successfully submitted. We are currently finding a driver for you. You will be notified as soon as a driver accepts your request.
ride.cityModalDescription: Before you can start using the application, you must configure your city. You will be redirected to your profile settings to do this.
ride.verificationCodeDesc: Share this 4-digit code with your driver upon arrival to securely start your trip.
ride.cannotEditAccepted: This ride has already been accepted by a driver.
ride.waitingForClientDesc: Please wait for the customer to confirm they are ready to start the ride on their screen.
ride.askClientForCode: Ask the customer for the 4-digit security code shown on their screen.
ride.confirmRidePrompt: Are you sure you want to confirm this ride and the proposed fare?
ride.readyToBeginPrompt: Are you sure you want to mark yourself as ready to begin the ride?
ride.notificationRideAcceptedBody: Your ride request has been accepted by {{driverName}}! Fare: {{price}} {{currency}}. Tap to view details.
ride.notificationDriverCancelledBody: The driver cancelled the acceptance. We are searching for a new driver.
ride.notificationRideConfirmedBody: The user {{userName}} confirmed the ride terms and price. Tap to proceed.
ride.notificationRideStartedBody: Your ride has started. Have a safe trip!
ride.notificationRideCompletedBody: You have arrived! Your ride is completed.
ride.notificationRideCancelledBody: The ride request has been cancelled.
ride.notificationClientReadyBody: The customer is ready to start. Enter the security code to begin.
ride.notificationRideCompletedBodyDriver: The ride is completed. Great job!
ride.notificationRideCancelledBodyDriver: The ride has been cancelled by the user.

settings.title: Settings
settings.signOutMessage: Are you sure you want to sign out?
settings.deleteAccountMessage: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountError: Unable to delete your account. Please try again later.

becomeDriver.title: Become a Driver
becomeDriver.subtitle: Submit your request to join as a driver
becomeDriver.pendingDescription: Your application is currently being reviewed by admins. You will be notified once approved.
becomeDriver.phoneRequired: At least one phone number is required
becomeDriver.submitSuccessDesc: Your request has been submitted successfully and is pending admin approval.
becomeDriver.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to submit your request to become a driver? This will send your profile and vehicle details to the admins for review.

updateUser.title: Edit Profile
updateUser.updateSuccessDescription: Your profile has been updated successfully.
updateUser.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
updateUser.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number.
updateUser.cannotDeletePrimary: Cannot delete the primary phone number.
updateUser.cannotDeletePrimaryEmail: Cannot delete the primary email address used to create your account.
updateUser.driverDescription: Enable driver functionality for this user
updateUser.adminDescription: Grant admin privileges to this user

confirmRide.title: Confirm Ride
confirmRide.cashDescription: Pay with cash when you arrive
confirmRide.invalidRide: Invalid ride data. Please try again.
confirmRide.userNotLoggedIn: You must be logged in to create a ride.
confirmRide.rideCreationFailed: Failed to create ride. Please try again.
confirmRide.rideCreatedSuccessDescription: Your ride has been created and is waiting for a driver to accept it.

rides.title: Available Rides
rides.noRidesDescription: There are no available rides in your area right now. Start a new ride to get on your way!

rate.title: Rating Details
rate.noRatesComfortHint: Passengers will rate you based on the comfort they experience during each ride.

fidelityPoints.startBooking: Start booking rides to earn fidelity points and redeem them on future trips!

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.approveConfirm: Are you sure you want to approve this request and make this user a driver?
admin.rejectConfirm: Are you sure you want to reject this request?

phoneSignIn.enterPhoneDescription: We will send you a 5-digit verification code.
phoneSignIn.enterCodeDescription: Enter the 5-digit code sent to your phone.
phoneSignIn.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number
